text:
Good question! I don't have the formal definition of the **CTA Structure** pillar in my knowledge base, but I can tell you it's one of the audit categories FlowBlinq GEO measures to assess how visible your site is to AI agents.

Your CTA Structure score is **42/100 (medium)**, which means there's room to improve how your calls-to-action are structured for AI visibility.

To see the full breakdown with specific findings and recommendations:

1. **Go to the Scorecard tab** on your results page — it shows detailed explanations for each pillar, including what FlowBlinq found on your site and why it matters.
2. **Check the Recommendations tab** — it lists prioritized fixes sorted by impact (HIGH/MED/LOW) to bring this score up.

Once you see what the audit flagged, I'm happy to help you understand how to fix it! What platform are you on? (I see Webflow detected for example.com.)
